name: Gramin Swasthya Seva Sangh
description: Works with ASHA workers to improve institutional delivery rates and PM-JAY enrollment in rural blocks around Kharagpur.

name: Medinipur Mahila Unnayan Samiti
description: Assists rural women with self-help group formation, microfinance access, and Kanyashree Prakalpa applications.

name: Krishak Sahayata Kendra
description: Helps farmer families with Krishak Bandhu, MGNREGA job card registration, and crop-related compensation claims.

name: Paschim Medinipur Disability Rights Forum
description: Supports disability certificate processing and pension scheme applications for persons with disabilities.

name: Shiksha Sahay Trust
description: Helps students from SC/ST/OBC backgrounds apply for National Scholarship Portal scholarships and tracks application status.
